notes: This file is an open-lemma staging area: 12 of 35 declarations carry sorry (Witnesses #3 and #4 fully open; L1, bridge B(i)-(iv), L15 open; L9 is a duplicate of the shipped verschiebung_dual_exists blocked by an import cycle). The longest non-sorry proof is function_field_x_separable (~118 lines), a char-uniform K(E)/K(x) separability argument using irreducibility + derivative criterion + finrank comparison; trace_eq_pi_plus_dualFrobenius_of_dual_additivity_witness (33 lines) is a conditional scaffold for the trace formula. Many of the 22 unused-in-file declarations are pack-field shadows or STALE/deprecated routes (witness_pc_sep_from_open_lemmas, additivity_witness_for_pc_sep, hasse_bound_from_open_lemmas) that are dead-code candidates once the pack-based API is the canonical entry point.
